$comment: Lighthouse CI config — runs LH against key URLs, asserts perf budgets.

assert.$comment: Assert ONLY the budgets we intend to gate on: category scores (a11y + SEO at ERROR), Core Web Vitals, and payload caps. We deliberately DROPPED the 'lighthouse:no-pwa' preset — it asserted ~100 individual audits at error level, including framework/third-party 'insight' audits (legacy-javascript from Next polyfills, network-dependency-tree from GTM/Clarity/Sentry) that can't realistically reach 0.9 and caused nightly false failures. The category gates below still enforce overall quality; individual audits (incl. colour-contrast) roll up into those scores. Note: the previous '$comment-*' keys lived INSIDE 'assertions' where LHCI treats every key as an audit ID, so they were asserted as phantom audits and always failed — removed.
